column7: Promotes early canopy closure; apply basal N at transplanting plus top-dress at tillering.
Enables fast early growth; complete fertilizer reduces need for multiple basal applications.
Enhances vegetative vigor with S support; reduces mid-season yellowing in sulfur-deficient soils.
Enhances grain filling and reduces chalky grains; K improves translucency of milled rice.
Vitamin B1 improves root growth and carbohydrate metabolism; foliar spray reduces transplanting shock effectively.
Bacterial component improves N fixation in rhizosphere; reduces total synthetic fertilizer requirement by 10–15%.
Root exudate mix enhances soil microbial biomass; improves long-term soil fertility and reduces fertilizer inputs.
Green manure incorporation improves soil biology; Azolla N release timing aligns with inbred's early vegetative demand.
Water-soluble nutrients rapidly absorbed to support tillering and heading; improves crop uniformity and yield stability.
